calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Benjamin Humpreys, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Jackie George.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Norma Brandon and Necole Armstrong.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Defendants John Barry Rost and J Rost Realty Inc. are dismissed without prejudice at the request of counsel for Plaintiff.

Plaintiff Jackie George sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $75,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $17,367.50
Costs: $1,856.35
Total Judgment in the amount of $94,223.85
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Moton Of Plaintiff For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Benjamin Humphreys of Law Offices of Richard Hurlburt (415-391-6496) appear for plaintiff Jackie George moving party. No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted, PLAINTIFF JACKIE GEORGE's Moton For Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff's motion for terminating sanctions and grant request for monetary sanctions in the amount of $497.50. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H Goldsmith, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Continued To May-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Moton To Compel Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Benjamin Humphreys, Law Offices of Richard Hurlburt, 415.391.6496, appearing for the Plaintiff Jackie George;
Norma (Brandon) Armstrong, Defendant and self-represented litigant, appears.

The tentative ruling is adopted with modifications: PLAINTIFF JACKIE GEORGE'S Motion To Compel Responses And For Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendants NORMA BRANDON, NECOLE ARMSTRONG, J. ROST REALTY, INC., AND JOHN BARRY ROST shall serve verified responses, without objection, to Plaintiff's Discovery, as specified in the Court's Order, on or before March 1, 2013. Plaintiff's request for sanctions in the amount of $560 is GRANTED. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Rebecca Woodson, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Benjamin Humphreys, Law Offices of Richard Hurlburt, 415.391.6496, appearing for the Plaintiff Jackie George;
Norma (Brandon) Armstrong, Defendant and self-represented litigant, appears.

The tentative ruling is adopted with modifiations: PLAINTIFF JACKIE GEORGE Motion To Compel Responses And For Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendants NORMA BRANDON, NECOLE ARMSTRONG, J. ROST REALTY, INC., AND JOHN BARRY ROST shall serve verified responses, without objection, to Plaintiff's Discovery, as specified in the Court's Order, on or before March 1, 2013. Plaintiff's request for sanctions in the amount of $310 is GRANTED. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Rebecca Woodson, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported. =302/JPT

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey Curtiss, Esq. of Stanzler Law Group, Tel. 650.739.0700, appearing on behalf of Tae W. Oh, counsel for defendants and moving party;
Norma Brandon, Tel.c415.724.9040, defendant appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: There being no opposition nor objection to the motion, and to the satisfaction of the court, TAE W. OH, ESQ. OF THE STANZLER LAW GROUP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS J ROST REALTY INC., JOHN ROST, NORMA BRANDON and NICOLE ARMSTRONG is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
